message:
Add missing APIs, edge cases, and implementation guidance

## Missing APIs Added:
- bd-1iqn: new_frame() and reset_to_full() for frame lifecycle
- bd-29v: Filter/search functionality (set_filter, search, jump_to)
- bd-2lwf: Export/import API for bug report sharing
- bd-2d2v: Timeout handling for OSC 52 clipboard reads

## Edge Cases & Safety:
- bd-3tiz: Animation edge case handling (zero duration, NaN, etc.)
- bd-6qxh: Cache coherence guidelines and safety rules

## Implementation Guidance:
- bd-3m7u: Complete list of ANSI sequences to support
- bd-em01: Zero-overhead tracing via compile-time feature gating

These additions ensure:
1. Complete APIs for all features
2. Robust handling of edge cases
3. Clear implementation guidance
4. Better developer experience

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
